title: Telegram WebApp API Complete Reference
description: Comprehensive JSON representation of the Telegram Mini Apps (WebApp) client-side API, covering all documented objects, properties, methods, events, and types based on the latest official documentation.

initData.description: Raw initialization data string passed to the Mini App. Use this for server-side validation.

initDataUnsafe.description: Parsed initialization data object. WARNING: Data from this field should not be trusted directly.

version.description: Version of the Bot API available in the user's Telegram app.

colorScheme.description: Current color scheme ('light' or 'dark'). Also available as CSS variable var(--tg-color-scheme).

isActive.description: True if the Mini App is currently active and visible. False if minimized.

isExpanded.description: True if the Mini App is expanded to maximum available height.

viewportHeight.description: Current viewport height in pixels. Also available as CSS variable var(--tg-viewport-height).

viewportStableHeight.description: Stable viewport height in pixels. Also available as CSS variable var(--tg-viewport-stable-height).

bottomBarColor.description: Current bottom bar color in #RRGGBB format. Applied to navigation bar on Android.

isClosingConfirmationEnabled.description: True if confirmation dialog is enabled when closing the Mini App.

isVerticalSwipesEnabled.description: True if vertical swipes to close/minimize are enabled.

isFullscreen.description: True if the Mini App is in fullscreen mode.

isOrientationLocked.description: True if the Mini App's orientation is locked.

safeAreaInset.description: System-defined safe area insets accounting for notches, navigation bars, etc.

contentSafeAreaInset.description: Safe area for content, avoiding Telegram UI elements.

BackButton.description: Controls the back button in the Mini App header.

isVisible.description: Shows whether the button is visible. Set to false by default.

show.description: Makes the button active and visible.

onClick.description: Sets the button press event handler. Alias for Telegram.WebApp.onEvent('backButtonClicked', callback).

offClick.description: Removes the button press event handler. Alias for Telegram.WebApp.offEvent('backButtonClicked', callback).

BottomButton.description: Controls a button at the bottom of the Mini App. Replaces MainButton in Bot API 7.10+.

type.description: Readonly. Type of the button: 'main' or 'secondary'.

text.description: Current button text. Default is 'Continue' for main and 'Cancel' for secondary.

color.description: Current button color. Set to themeParams.button_color for main and themeParams.bottom_bar_bg_color for secondary.

textColor.description: Current button text color. Set to themeParams.button_text_color for main and themeParams.button_color for secondary.

isVisible.description: Shows whether the button is visible. Set to false by default.

isActive.description: Shows whether the button is active. Set to true by default.

hasShineEffect.description: Shows whether the button has a shine effect. Set to false by default.

position.description: Position of the secondary button. Values: 'left', 'right', 'top', 'bottom'. Default is 'left'. Not defined for main button.

iconCustomEmojiId.description: Unique identifier of the custom emoji shown before the button text.

isProgressVisible.description: Readonly. Shows whether the button is displaying a loading indicator.

setParams.description: Sets multiple button parameters at once. Accepts an object with: icon_custom_emoji_id, text, color, text_color, has_shine_effect, position, is_active, is_visible.

show.description: Makes the button visible. Note: Opening from attachment menu hides main button until user interaction.

showProgress.description: Shows a loading indicator. By default disables button; pass leaveActive=true to keep it enabled.

onClick.description: Sets the button's press event handler. Alias for Telegram.WebApp.onEvent('mainButtonClicked', callback).

offClick.description: Removes the button's press event handler. Alias for Telegram.WebApp.offEvent('mainButtonClicked', callback).

SettingsButton.description: Controls the Settings item in the context menu.

isVisible.description: Shows whether the context menu item is visible. Set to false by default.

show.description: Makes the Settings item in context menu visible.

hide.description: Hides the Settings item in context menu.

onClick.description: Sets the press event handler. Alias for Telegram.WebApp.onEvent('settingsButtonClicked', callback).

offClick.description: Removes the press event handler. Alias for Telegram.WebApp.offEvent('settingsButtonClicked', callback).

HapticFeedback.description: Controls haptic feedback on the device.

impactOccurred.description: Indicates an impact occurred. Plays appropriate haptics based on style.

notificationOccurred.description: Indicates a task or action succeeded, failed, or produced a warning.

selectionChanged.description: Indicates the user changed a selection. Do not use when making a selection, only when it changes.

CloudStorage.description: Controls cloud storage. Each bot can store up to 1024 items per user.

setItem.description: Stores a value in cloud storage. Key: 1-128 chars (A-Z, a-z, 0-9, _, -). Value: 0-4096 chars.

getItem.description: Retrieves a value from cloud storage.

getItems.description: Retrieves multiple values from cloud storage.

removeItem.description: Removes a value from cloud storage.

removeItems.description: Removes multiple values from cloud storage.

getKeys.description: Retrieves all keys stored in cloud storage.

BiometricManager.description: Controls biometrics on the device. Must be initialized before use.

isInited.description: Shows whether biometrics object is initialized.

isBiometricAvailable.description: Shows whether biometrics is available on the current device.

isAccessRequested.description: Shows whether permission to use biometrics has been requested.

isAccessGranted.description: Shows whether permission to use biometrics has been granted.

isBiometricTokenSaved.description: Shows whether the token is saved in secure storage.

deviceId.description: Unique device identifier for matching the token to the device.

init.description: Initializes the BiometricManager object. Must be called before first use.

updateBiometricToken.description: Updates the biometric token. Pass empty string to remove.

openSettings.description: Opens biometric access settings for bots. Can only be called in response to user interaction.

Accelerometer.description: Provides access to accelerometer data on the device.

isStarted.description: Indicates whether accelerometer tracking is currently active.

DeviceOrientation.description: Provides access to device orientation data.

isStarted.description: Indicates whether orientation tracking is currently active.

absolute.description: Indicates whether data is provided in absolute values.

Gyroscope.description: Provides access to gyroscope data on the device.

isStarted.description: Indicates whether gyroscope tracking is currently active.

LocationManager.description: Controls location access on the device. Must be initialized before use.

isInited.description: Shows whether LocationManager has been initialized.

isLocationAvailable.description: Shows whether location services are available on the device.

isAccessRequested.description: Shows whether permission to use location has been requested.

isAccessGranted.description: Shows whether permission to use location has been granted.

init.description: Initializes LocationManager. Must be called before first use.

openSettings.description: Opens location access settings. Can only be called in response to user interaction.

DeviceStorage.description: Provides persistent local storage on the user's device. Similar to localStorage. Up to 5 MB per user.

setItem.description: Stores a value in local storage.

getItem.description: Retrieves a value from local storage.

removeItem.description: Removes a value from local storage.

clear.description: Clears all keys stored in local storage.

SecureStorage.description: Provides secure, encrypted local storage using iOS Keychain or Android Keystore. Up to 10 items per user.

setItem.description: Stores an encrypted value in secure storage.

getItem.description: Retrieves an encrypted value from secure storage. Third argument indicates if key can be restored.

removeItem.description: Removes a value from secure storage.

clear.description: Clears all keys stored in secure storage.

restoreItem.description: Attempts to restore a key that previously existed on the current device. Prompts user for permission.

methods.name: isVersionAtLeast
methods.description: Checks if the user's app supports a Bot API version equal to or higher than specified.

methods.name: setHeaderColor
methods.description: Sets the app header color. Can use #RRGGBB format or keywords 'bg_color', 'secondary_bg_color'.

methods.name: setBackgroundColor
methods.description: Sets the app background color. Can use #RRGGBB format or keywords 'bg_color', 'secondary_bg_color'.

methods.name: setBottomBarColor
methods.description: Sets the app's bottom bar color. Can use #RRGGBB format or keywords 'bg_color', 'secondary_bg_color', 'bottom_bar_bg_color'.

methods.name: enableClosingConfirmation
methods.description: Enables a confirmation dialog when the user tries to close the Mini App.

methods.name: disableClosingConfirmation
methods.description: Disables the confirmation dialog when closing the Mini App.

methods.name: enableVerticalSwipes
methods.description: Enables vertical swipes to close or minimize the Mini App. Recommended unless conflicting with app gestures.

methods.name: disableVerticalSwipes
methods.description: Disables vertical swipes to close or minimize. Useful if app uses conflicting swipe gestures.

methods.name: requestFullscreen
methods.description: Requests opening the Mini App in fullscreen mode.

methods.name: exitFullscreen
methods.description: Requests exiting fullscreen mode.

methods.name: lockOrientation
methods.description: Locks the Mini App's orientation to its current mode (portrait or landscape).

methods.name: unlockOrientation
methods.description: Unlocks the Mini App's orientation, allowing it to follow device rotation.

methods.name: addToHomeScreen
methods.description: Prompts the user to add the Mini App to the home screen.

methods.name: checkHomeScreenStatus
methods.description: Checks if adding to home screen is supported and if the Mini App has already been added.

methods.name: onEvent
methods.description: Sets an event handler for the Mini App.

methods.name: offEvent
methods.description: Removes a previously set event handler.

methods.name: sendData
methods.description: Sends data to the bot as a service message (up to 4096 bytes). Only available for Keyboard Button Mini Apps.

methods.name: switchInlineQuery
methods.description: Inserts the bot's username and specified inline query in the current chat's input field.

methods.name: openLink
methods.description: Opens a link in an external browser. Mini App will NOT be closed.
methods.restriction: Must be called in response to user interaction

methods.name: openTelegramLink
methods.description: Opens a telegram link inside the Telegram app. Mini App will NOT be closed (since Bot API 7.0+).

methods.name: openInvoice
methods.description: Opens an invoice using the provided link.

methods.name: shareToStory
methods.description: Opens the native story editor with the specified media.

methods.name: shareMessage
methods.description: Opens a dialog allowing the user to share a PreparedInlineMessage.

methods.name: setEmojiStatus
methods.description: Opens a dialog allowing the user to set a custom emoji as their status.

methods.name: requestEmojiStatusAccess
methods.description: Shows a native popup requesting permission for the bot to manage user's emoji status.

methods.name: downloadFile
methods.description: Displays a native popup prompting the user to download a file.

methods.name: hideKeyboard
methods.description: Hides the on-screen keyboard if it is currently visible. Does nothing if not active.

methods.name: requestChat
methods.description: Opens a dialog allowing the user to select an existing chat or create a new one.

methods.name: showPopup
methods.description: Shows a native popup described by PopupParams.

methods.name: showAlert
methods.description: Shows a simple alert with a 'Close' button.

methods.name: showConfirm
methods.description: Shows a confirmation window with 'OK' and 'Cancel' buttons.

methods.name: showScanQrPopup
methods.description: Shows a native popup for scanning a QR code.

callback.note: Returning true inside callback closes the popup

methods.name: closeScanQrPopup
methods.description: Closes the native QR code scanner popup.

methods.name: readTextFromClipboard
methods.description: Requests text from the clipboard. Only available for Attachment Menu Mini Apps.
methods.restriction: Attachment menu Mini Apps only, in response to user interaction

methods.name: requestWriteAccess
methods.description: Shows a native popup requesting permission for the bot to send messages to the user.

methods.name: requestContact
methods.description: Shows a native popup prompting the user for their phone number.

methods.name: requestChat
methods.description: Opens a dialog allowing the user to select an existing chat or create a new one.

methods.name: ready
methods.description: Informs Telegram that the Mini App is ready to be displayed. Call as early as possible.

methods.name: expand
methods.description: Expands the Mini App to maximum available height.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes the Mini App.

activated.description: Triggered when the Mini App becomes active (e.g., opened from minimized state or selected among tabs).

deactivated.description: Triggered when the Mini App becomes inactive (e.g., minimized or moved to inactive tab).

themeChanged.description: Triggered when theme settings change. Access new settings via this.themeParams and this.colorScheme.

viewportChanged.description: Triggered when the visible section of the Mini App changes.

safeAreaChanged.description: Triggered when device safe area insets change.

contentSafeAreaChanged.description: Triggered when content safe area insets change.

mainButtonClicked.description: Triggered when the main button is pressed.

secondaryButtonClicked.description: Triggered when the secondary button is pressed.

backButtonClicked.description: Triggered when the back button is pressed.

settingsButtonClicked.description: Triggered when the Settings item in context menu is pressed.

invoiceClosed.description: Triggered when an opened invoice is closed.

popupClosed.description: Triggered when a popup is closed.

qrTextReceived.description: Triggered when the QR code scanner catches a code with text data.

scanQrPopupClosed.description: Triggered when the QR code scanner popup is closed by the user.

clipboardTextReceived.description: Triggered when text is read from the clipboard.

writeAccessRequested.description: Triggered when write permission was requested.

contactRequested.description: Triggered when the user's phone number was requested.

biometricAuthRequested.description: Triggered when biometric authentication was requested.

biometricTokenUpdated.description: Triggered when the biometric token was updated.

fullscreenChanged.description: Triggered when the Mini App enters or exits fullscreen mode.

fullscreenFailed.description: Triggered if a request to enter fullscreen mode fails.

homeScreenAdded.description: Triggered when the Mini App is successfully added to the home screen.

homeScreenChecked.description: Triggered after checking the home screen status.

accelerometerStarted.description: Triggered when accelerometer tracking has started successfully.

accelerometerStopped.description: Triggered when accelerometer tracking has stopped.

accelerometerChanged.description: Triggered with specified frequency after start(), sending current accelerometer data.

accelerometerFailed.description: Triggered if a request to start accelerometer tracking fails.

deviceOrientationStarted.description: Triggered when device orientation tracking has started successfully.

deviceOrientationStopped.description: Triggered when device orientation tracking has stopped.

deviceOrientationChanged.description: Triggered with specified frequency after start(), sending current orientation data.

deviceOrientationFailed.description: Triggered if a request to start device orientation tracking fails.

gyroscopeStarted.description: Triggered when gyroscope tracking has started successfully.

gyroscopeStopped.description: Triggered when gyroscope tracking has stopped.

gyroscopeChanged.description: Triggered with specified frequency after start(), sending current gyroscope data.

gyroscopeFailed.description: Triggered if a request to start gyroscope tracking fails.

locationRequested.description: Triggered when location data is requested.

shareMessageSent.description: Triggered when the message is successfully shared.

shareMessageFailed.description: Triggered if sharing the message fails.

emojiStatusSet.description: Triggered when the emoji status is successfully set.

emojiStatusFailed.description: Triggered if setting the emoji status fails.

emojiStatusAccessRequested.description: Triggered when emoji status permission was requested.

fileDownloadRequested.description: Triggered when the user responds to the file download request.

ThemeParams.description: Theme settings object containing current user's theme colors.

section_header_text_color.description: Section header text color. CSS var: --tg-theme-section-header-text-color

destructive_text_color.description: Destructive action text color. CSS var: --tg-theme-destructive-text-color

ContentSafeAreaInset.description: Content-defined safe area insets avoiding Telegram UI elements.

start_param.description: startattach or startapp parameter from link

can_send_after.description: Time in seconds after which a message can be sent

auth_date.description: Unix timestamp when form was opened

is_bot.description: True if user is a bot

added_to_attachment_menu.description: True if user added bot to attachment menu (optional)

allows_write_to_pm.description: True if user allowed bot to message them (optional)

course.description: Direction in degrees (0=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W). null if unavailable

speed.description: Speed in m/s. null if unavailable

horizontal_accuracy.description: Accuracy of lat/long in meters. null if unavailable

vertical_accuracy.description: Accuracy of altitude in meters. null if unavailable

course_accuracy.description: Accuracy of course in degrees. null if unavailable

speed_accuracy.description: Accuracy of speed in m/s. null if unavailable

id.description: Button identifier (0-64 chars). Returned in callback.

text.description: Button text (0-64 chars). Required for 'default' and 'destructive' types.

url.description: URL to include in the story

duration.description: Duration in seconds for the status

url.description: HTTPS URL of the file to download

file_name.description: Suggested name for the downloaded file

DownloadFileParams.note: Include headers: Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="<file_name>" and Access-Control-Allow-Origin: https://web.telegram.org

need_absolute.description: Request absolute orientation data (for compass). Default: false

Bot API 7.0 (2023): openTelegramLink no longer closes Mini App
